body.thing: GeneralDomain escalation on a confident wrong answer
body.intention: When the cheapest rung returns a confident WRONG answer, GeneralDomain bumps exactly one rung and returns the stronger rung's correct answer — it never hands back the confabulation.

red_run.summary:
This is the whole prototype. If a confabulation satisfied the completion contract, the
        walk would return the wrong answer at hop 0 and escalation would be decorative.
        """
        dom, dev = _domain(

            answer_check=_is_42,

body.why: Chat is the simplest consumer of the escalation walk: one dispatch, one reply, no tools. If escalation cannot be made correct here it cannot be made correct anywhere. The red is the shipped 2026-07-08 bug in miniature — a stub that returns whatever the cheapest model said.
